records.title: Housing score missed current shelter needs
records.narrativeText: The housing prioritization score kept using old records even after I was sleeping in a shelter. The Pittsburgh Housing Authority worker could not explain why my voucher request stayed low priority.

records.title: Family screening score made the visit feel already decided
records.narrativeText: The Allegheny County Department of Human Services family screening score marked my family high risk before anyone listened to the new information.

agencies: Allegheny County Department of Human Services

records.title: Job matching referral helped after staff review
records.narrativeText: The job matching system at the employment office suggested a useful referral after the career center worker checked my skills and schedule.

records.title: General platform feedback
records.narrativeText: I attended a community meeting and learned that public technology can be hard to understand. I do not have a specific system story yet.

records.title: Housing summary should skip setup sentence
records.narrativeText: Before I explain the issue, I want to say the front desk staff were polite. Last month the housing prioritization system used an old shelter record and kept my voucher request low priority. The worker at the Pittsburgh Housing Authority could not tell me which record caused the score.
